assertionResults.fullName: parseTriggerPolicy returns sensible defaults for an empty settings object
assertionResults.title: returns sensible defaults for an empty settings object

assertionResults.fullName: parseTriggerPolicy respects an explicit "enabled = false" kill-switch
assertionResults.title: respects an explicit "enabled = false" kill-switch

assertionResults.fullName: parseTriggerPolicy accepts kev_action = "alert_only" and rejects junk values
assertionResults.title: accepts kev_action = "alert_only" and rejects junk values

assertionResults.fullName: parseTriggerPolicy accepts a valid epss_threshold in [0, 1] and falls back to default for anything else
assertionResults.title: accepts a valid epss_threshold in [0, 1] and falls back to default for anything else

assertionResults.fullName: buildTriggerReason returns null when neither KEV nor EPSS meets the threshold
assertionResults.title: returns null when neither KEV nor EPSS meets the threshold

assertionResults.fullName: buildTriggerReason returns null when EPSS is null and KEV not listed
assertionResults.title: returns null when EPSS is null and KEV not listed

assertionResults.fullName: buildTriggerReason triggers on KEV listing regardless of EPSS
assertionResults.title: triggers on KEV listing regardless of EPSS

assertionResults.fullName: buildTriggerReason downgrades KEV path to alert_only when policy says so
assertionResults.title: downgrades KEV path to alert_only when policy says so

assertionResults.fullName: buildTriggerReason triggers on EPSS at or above threshold (boundary check)
assertionResults.title: triggers on EPSS at or above threshold (boundary check)

assertionResults.fullName: buildTriggerReason does not trigger on EPSS just below the threshold
assertionResults.title: does not trigger on EPSS just below the threshold

assertionResults.fullName: buildTriggerReason respects a custom EPSS threshold
assertionResults.title: respects a custom EPSS threshold

assertionResults.fullName: buildTriggerReason rejects a non-finite EPSS score (defensive against bad data)
assertionResults.title: rejects a non-finite EPSS score (defensive against bad data)

assertionResults.title: handles awareness near a month / year boundary correctly

assertionResults.title: returns three independent Date instances (no shared mutation)

assertionResults.title: KEV body names CISA KEV, due date, ransomware, and 24-hour clock when a report exists

assertionResults.title: KEV body without due date / ransomware skips those clauses cleanly

assertionResults.title: EPSS body names the score, threshold, and exploitation framing

assertionResults.title: alert_only body (no report) wording differs from triggered body

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority leaves severity unchanged and emits no prefix when enrichment is empty
assertionResults.title: leaves severity unchanged and emits no prefix when enrichment is empty

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority KEV-listed bumps any starting severity straight to critical
assertionResults.title: KEV-listed bumps any starting severity straight to critical

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority KEV-listed without due date or ransomware emits a clean prefix
assertionResults.title: KEV-listed without due date or ransomware emits a clean prefix

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority EPSS ≥ 0.9 (no KEV) bumps severity exactly one tier
assertionResults.title: EPSS ≥ 0.9 (no KEV) bumps severity exactly one tier

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority EPSS ≥ 0.9 caps at critical (already-critical stays critical)
assertionResults.title: EPSS ≥ 0.9 caps at critical (already-critical stays critical)

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority EPSS bump emits an EPSS-evidence prefix line with score and percentile
assertionResults.title: EPSS bump emits an EPSS-evidence prefix line with score and percentile

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority EPSS < 0.01 + CVSS < 4.0 (no KEV) caps severity at low and emits a deprioritise prefix
assertionResults.title: EPSS < 0.01 + CVSS < 4.0 (no KEV) caps severity at low and emits a deprioritise prefix

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority EPSS < 0.01 but CVSS ≥ 4.0 leaves severity unchanged (deprioritise gate is conjunctive)
assertionResults.title: EPSS < 0.01 but CVSS ≥ 4.0 leaves severity unchanged (deprioritise gate is conjunctive)

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority KEV beats deprioritise: low EPSS does not undo a KEV bump
assertionResults.title: KEV beats deprioritise: low EPSS does not undo a KEV bump

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority EPSS just below the bump threshold (0.89) does not bump
assertionResults.title: EPSS just below the bump threshold (0.89) does not bump

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority respects a custom policy override
assertionResults.title: respects a custom policy override

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority default policy thresholds match the documented values (0.9 / 0.01)
assertionResults.title: default policy thresholds match the documented values (0.9 / 0.01)

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority treats unknown / blank starting severity as medium for ranking purposes
assertionResults.title: treats unknown / blank starting severity as medium for ranking purposes

assertionResults.fullName: isActivelyExploited returns true for KEV-listed regardless of EPSS
assertionResults.title: returns true for KEV-listed regardless of EPSS

assertionResults.fullName: isActivelyExploited returns true for EPSS at the bump threshold (0.9) even without KEV
assertionResults.title: returns true for EPSS at the bump threshold (0.9) even without KEV

assertionResults.fullName: isActivelyExploited returns false for EPSS just below the threshold (0.89)
assertionResults.title: returns false for EPSS just below the threshold (0.89)

assertionResults.fullName: isActivelyExploited returns false when both signals are absent
assertionResults.title: returns false when both signals are absent

assertionResults.fullName: isActivelyExploited respects a custom EPSS threshold
assertionResults.title: respects a custom EPSS threshold
